parameters:
The Village Chief taught me something important. I clearly understood what kind of
person I am at that altar. I no longer need to leave this village.
↑North Forest There is a monster ruin deep in the forest, do not enter

This is the only bathhouse in the village. Village residents can enter for free, so
you can always clean your body!

...But no matter when I come, it's never very crowded. Does everyone not really want
to take baths? ...Especially Dario, or Dario...

...This is the only bathhouse in the village, but honestly, I don't really want to
get close. I can hear Elly's moans coming from the mixed bathing side, and it's
unbearable...

Elly doesn't seem to have much time for a part-time job lately. But she doesn't need
to earn money anymore. As long as she's in this village, my little sister is part of
everyone's family...
Since Dario's back too, he'll probably get this field back in order. That's a relief!

...He's completely ignoring the fields, obsessed with devouring Elly's body... The
day this place is filled with crops like it used to be might never come......

...Now, no one in the village shows any interest in the fields anymore. Everyone just
competes to impregnate Elly... It seems no one plants seeds in the soil
anymore........
This road ahead leads to the Royal City, but I can't go back now...

I can't leave this village right now... I'm worried about Elly. That girl's
boyfriend... I need to see if Dario can really make my sister happy.

I can't leave this place... not until I free Elly from this wretched village... I
have to make the Village Chief acknowledge it soon...
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = South_Orig
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = South_Orig

Have Elly give birth? Giving birth will end the pregnancy state (During pregnancy,
there is a first-time sex event for each partner character).

Elly gave birth! It's a healthy baby that looks like \V[80]! Congratulations, Uncle
\n[1]!

イベントID(もしくは名称) = East_Orig

Oh, \n[1], you look full of energy today as well. Keep working hard for the village,
you hear?
\n[1]-kun... No, I won't say anything more... If that's the path you believe in...

...? What's this? A mud ball made by rolling mud... Looking closer, there are marks
where it hit the house wall...

...It must be that cocky-looking kid's prank...... Poor old man, having his house
wall messed up like this... ...Should I clean it up for him?

Still, seeing this reminds me... Back in the day, when I played house with Elly,
Mana, and Dario... Mana once served me a mud ball like this as a dish...

Oh, \n[1]-kun, good morning... I'm glad to see you've regained your energy. Please
continue to do your best as a member of the village for our sake.

\n[1], what's up, you're really fired up again today! I'm impressed... even though
Elly-chan isn't paying you any attention... You must be a real masochist, huh...!

Whew... It's a clear, fine morning... Come to think of it, that day was a pleasant
morning like this too, wasn't it? Do you remember, \n[1]-kun? When we all went to visit
my town.

Yes! Of course I remember! We hardly ever had a chance to leave this village... That
time was really fun...!

But back then, only Elly-chan was against going to the town... You and \n[1]-kun ended
up having a fight right around here, didn't you? Did you manage to make up properly
afterwards?

Ah, yeah... um... Elly really held a grudge against us for going to the city without
listening to her... She wouldn't forgive us for a few days...

Haha! I knew it! Elly-chan used to be so stubborn and headstrong... Even her big
brother must have a hard time when he makes that girl angry...

Angry, huh... That day, Elly wasn't so much angry that we went to town... rather, she
was worried about whether we'd come back safely...

Right around this sign, she waited alone in the sunset until we returned. In the
chilly air, the whole time...

It's true she usually seems quick-tempered and strong-willed... but she actually has
a very anxious, timid side too. ...As Elly grew up, she stopped showing that face.

Maybe I should properly remember and face it again... Her true self that she tries to
hide...
